annotation_target.structure: Final section consequent — warm intimate texture to the last note
teaching_goals: every note counts to the very end
the intimate texture never abandons its warmth

teaching_notes.note: The warmth lasts to the final note — never let it go cold.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 37–40 of Traumerei (Dreaming) from Kinderszenen (continuation of mm. 33–36), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 37–40 and describe the completion.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 37–40.
Measures 37–40 bring the completion of this phrase — Schumann's final expressive gestures settle the piece toward rest. The texture remains warm and intimate to the last note. Let me loop mm. 37–40.
Schumann Traumerei mm. 37–40: final phrase completion, warm intimate texture. Pairs with mm. 33–36.
